name: Easy Chicken and Rice Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Place an Uncle Ben's box or envelope of flavored rice (wild or pilaf, etc.) in the casserole dish.
2. If using plain white rice, use long cooking kind and add spices to taste: curry, paprika, pepper, etc.
3. Combine dry rice with its flavor packet if available, add 1 can of cream of mushroom soup, and 1/2 to 1 full can of water.
4. Stir well with a fork (the soup will be lumpy).
5. Add washed and skinned pieces of chicken into the mixture.
6. Bake at 375°F for 45 minutes to an hour, depending on the type of rice used. Wild rice may require longer cooking time.
7. If rice begins to dry out, add water during cooking. For a quicker bake, try 400°F with less cooking time.
8. If the mixture is relatively soupy before baking, cover it; if not very soupy, bake uncovered.
9. Remove from oven when both the rice and chicken are cooked through.
